title: number format
author: PashaFrontEnd

comments.author: MortenTranholm
comments.body: I am facing the same issue, which might be related to language settings/locale. I am parsing a num format of 0,00%. When viewing the cell in Excel the comma has been changed to a dot and the format is #.000%. If I however parse the numFormat 0.00% - it will render as 0,00% in Excel. So it seems , is changed to . and the other way around. For dates the format DD/MM/YYYY becomes DD-MM-YYYY. Did you find a workaround for this issue?

comments.author: bulrene
comments.body: I confirmed the same issue, too.

comments.author: udondan
comments.body: Indeed, `.` is replaced with `,` and vice versa. 😕
